headline: Semi/tech carnage extends overnight: MU -13%, SNDK -14%, QQQ -3.3%; no desk takes, nothing actionable yet

market_state.line: Regime says risk_on but tape disagrees — SPY -1.4%, QQQ -3.3%, VXX stress ratio ~1.0; semis lead down, wait for stabilization before entries

watch.line: -21.5% on 4.7x rel vol + MACD bearish cross — highest-conviction breakdown on the board, watch for continuation or bounce setup at open.
-13.2% on elevated vol; semi bellwether move likely to set tone for chip complex at RTH open.
-13.7% alongside MU — storage semis in sync; watch for capitulation wick or dead-cat at key levels.
Only notable green: +12.4% on 1.7x vol — lone momentum name in a sea of red, needs catalyst confirmation.
-15.6% energy storage name; low rel vol (1.07x) suggests thin overnight tape, gap may fill or extend at open.

changed: Desk dropped lone CWAN long take — actions now empty
Semi rout broadening: SNDK and AXTI join MU in double-digit losses overnight
caveats: OVERNIGHT window — prices as of 20:01 ET scan time; after-hours liquidity is thin and levels can shift materially before RTH open.
Regime label 'risk_on' is structurally derived (SPY above 50d MA) and lags intraday/overnight price action; current tape behavior is risk-off in character.
